import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let n = a.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match a.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    match b.get(i)
    when Some(y)
      print("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
